title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions!
